center.name: Chiltern, Victoria
center.summary: Chiltern, Victoria是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Pied butcherbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Victoria, it is found along the Murray Valley and west of Chiltern. In South Australia, it is not found in the north-east of the state nor on the Adelaide plain

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Victoria, it is found along the Murray Valley and west of Chiltern. In South Australia, it is not found in the north-east of the state nor on the Adelaide plain
